title: L1 tasks 80% complete

title: Saturday staffing trial — week 1
description: Tried fixed station assignments during Saturday peak. Table clear time dropped from 8 minutes to under 3. Team feedback positive.

title: Portion control system live

title: Owner considering afternoon co-working pivot

title: Wi-Fi upgraded to business plan
description: 100 Mbps fibre installed. Mesh system covers full venue. Password on table cards. S026 likely resolved.
